title: How do I forget a wireless network on macOS?
plain_text: This article provides the steps to forget or remove a wireless network on macOS. Forget a wireless network Select 'Apple Menu' > 'System Settings'... Select 'Network'. Select 'Wi-Fi'. Scroll to the bottom and select 'Advanced..'. Select Three dots icon next to the wireless network you want to forget. Choose 'Remove From List'. Select 'Done'.
body_html:
This article provides the steps to forget or remove a wireless network on macOS.

Forget a wireless network

  • Select 'Apple Menu' > 'System Settings'...
  • Select 'Network'.
  • Select 'Wi-Fi'.
  • Scroll to the bottom and select 'Advanced..'.
  • Select Three dots icon next to the wireless network you want to forget.
  • Choose 'Remove From List'.
  • Select 'Done'.

steps: Scroll to the bottom and select 'Advanced..'.
Select Three dots icon next to the wireless network you want to forget.
